'''CorDuro Shipping''' was a major trade corporation based in the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian]] and [[Duro sector/Legends|Duro sectors]].

It maintained a fleet of transports, many of these barely spaceworthy. The Duro-based concern also employed a relatively large (though poorly trained) security force at its main offices, located in the Duro [[Space station/Legends|orbital city]] of [[Bburru Station|Bburru]]. The CorDuro logo was distinctively triangular, serving as an easy way to identify a constituent of its motor pool. Its vice-director was [[Durgard Brarun]].

In [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]], CorDuro Shipping took control of the [[Pri-Andylan shipyards]]. During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]], [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Tresina Lobi]] and [[Thrynni Vae]] discovered CorDuro Shipping's ties to the [[Peace Brigade]], resulting in the Brigade murdering Thrynni. Jedi masters [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Mara Jade Skywalker]], [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]], and [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] spearheaded a discreet investigation into Thrynni's disappearance, which culminated in an abduction attempt on Jacen Solo, in turn spoiled by a rogue [[Sunesi]] priest. However, Luke was able to recover information on Thrynni which revealed the young apprentice's death. Their collaboration, however, did little to help them, as most of CorDuro's executives were fed to [[Sgauru]] and [[Tu-Scart]] by [[Warmaster]] [[Tsavong Lah]].
